expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: The provided outputs contain only an evaluation narrative (result.md) and do not include any Phase 4a generated plan/scenario artifact (e.g., drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r*.md) showing that SDK/API-visible outcomes (like window title) were turned into explicit scenarios with observable verification leaves. result.md itself notes this limitation: "No Phase 4a output artifact (`drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r*.md`) is included... cannot confirm an actual generated draft contains the required explicit scenarios". Therefore the expectation is not evidenced by the output files.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as a Phase 4a evaluation: title "P4A-SDK-CONTRACT-001 — Phase 4a Benchmark Evaluation" and it states "Primary phase under test: phase4a". The content focuses on Phase 4a contract requirements and phase alignment, so the output aligns to phase4a (even though it does not include the actual Phase 4a draft artifact).
